headline: Atlas Air Airbus Shift Tests Confidence In Boeing Widebody Freighters
summary: Atlas Air, the world's largest operator of Boeing 747 freighters, has placed its first order for Airbus A350 freighters. The order marks a shift in a major cargo customer's fleet plans toward Airbus widebody freighters. The decision highlights questions around Boeing's 777-8F timeline and competitiveness in the cargo widebody segment. Boeing (NYSE:BA) is facing this development with its shares around $210.82, after a 13.2% decline over the past 30 days and a 7.4% decline year to date. Even...
